_doc: Copy to alerts.local.json (gitignored, like ruleset.local.json) and edit. Both channels default to disabled — DIVE will compute and log alert events without dispatching until at least one channel is enabled. SMTP credentials live in env vars (DIVE_SMTP_HOST, DIVE_SMTP_PORT, DIVE_SMTP_USER, DIVE_SMTP_PASS, DIVE_SMTP_SECURE).
